name_zh: 都市自我犒赏型消费者
jtbd_zh: 在压力、下班、周末或情绪时刻获得高品质的小奖励
jtbd_en: Enjoy a high-quality personal reward after work, on weekends or during emotional moments.

name_zh: 情侣 / 约会型消费者
jtbd_zh: 为约会、纪念日和共享时刻增加轻仪式感
jtbd_en: Add a sense of occasion to dates, anniversaries and shared moments.

jtbd_zh: 选择体面、不出错、有情绪价值的礼物
jtbd_en: Choose a presentable, safe and emotionally meaningful gift.

jtbd_zh: 把高品质甜品带入家庭分享时刻
jtbd_en: Bring a premium dessert into family-sharing moments at home.

name_zh: 零售 / 餐饮渠道客户
jtbd_zh: 优化产品组合、动销、毛利、周转和渠道适配
jtbd_en: Optimize assortment, sell-through, margin, turnover and channel fit.

jtbd_zh: 快速、安心地解决家人愿意吃的一顿晚餐
jtbd_en: Put a quick, trusted dinner on the table that the family will accept.

jtbd_zh: 不做复杂烹饪，也不想用低质量外卖将就
jtbd_en: Avoid complex cooking without settling for low-quality takeaway.

jtbd_zh: 选择孩子愿意吃、家长也放心的快手餐
jtbd_en: Choose a fast meal children enjoy and parents can trust.

jtbd_zh: 在冬至、春节、元宵等节点兼顾传统、便利与团圆感
jtbd_en: Balance tradition, convenience and togetherness during seasonal occasions.

name_zh: 品质与性价比平衡型用户
jtbd_zh: 在品质、安全、份量与价格之间找到“值得”
jtbd_en: Find the right balance of quality, safety, portion and price.

jtbd_zh: 优化货架、冷柜、补货、周转、毛利与执行一致性
jtbd_en: Optimize shelf, freezer, replenishment, turnover, margin and execution consistency.

jtbd_zh: 在时间、营养与家庭接受度之间完成日常餐食决策
jtbd_en: Balance time, nutrition and family acceptance in everyday meal decisions.

name_zh: 都市自我犒赏型消费者
jtbd_zh: 用高品质产品获得即时情绪奖励
jtbd_en: Use a premium product as an immediate emotional reward.

jtbd_zh: 在节日、关系与团聚时刻选择合适产品
jtbd_en: Choose the right product for festivals, relationships and reunion moments.

jtbd_zh: 用更少准备获得不将就的便利体验
jtbd_en: Get a convenient but non-compromised experience with minimal preparation.

jtbd_zh: 看懂配料、营养与健康价值后再做选择
jtbd_en: Understand ingredients, nutrition and health value before choosing.

jtbd_zh: 用数据优化组合、库存、毛利与渠道执行
jtbd_en: Use data to optimize assortment, inventory, margin and channel execution.
